narrative:
Dodson (precinct in Highland County) has 748 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.7 percentage points.
